local_findings.text: HIPAA compliance requirements are substantial. Recent internal discussions indicate projected costs of $2.5M for Q2 2024.
Our Q3 2022 implementation saw costs of $130K.
Q3 2025 compliance violations: 5 reported violations in state-specific regulations.
Provider insurance acceptance rates are tracking at 60% by Q3 2025.
HIPAA-related staff training will require approximately 1,200 hours of investment.

research_question_variants.question: How has our HIPAA compliance cost trajectory evolved from Q3 2022 to current?

eval_questions.answer: Projected HIPAA compliance cost is $2.5M for Q2 2024.
